hooks.command: if ! command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'ArtifactFlow AI safety hook runner requires python3; denying operation.' >&2; exit 2; fi; python3 "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/scripts/ai-hooks/guard_prompt.py" --agent claude || exit 2
